original_hypothesis.title: acceptAddressesAndPercentages Approves Zero-Address Proposals Enabling ETH Burning
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: acceptAddressesAndPercentages can set status=true without verifying that proposePrimaryAddressesAndPercentages was ever called. Default values are address(0) for all addresses and 0 for all percentages. If approved, payArtist sends ETH to address(0) via .call which succeeds, permanently burning the artist's share of mint proceeds.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: There is no guard in acceptAddressesAndPercentages checking that addresses were actually proposed. The function directly sets status booleans, enabling payArtist to distribute to uninitialized (zero) addresses.

proof_of_signal.pattern: acceptAddressesAndPercentages directly sets status without checking any proposal fields; no require that primaryAdd1 != address(0)

preconditions: Function admin calls acceptAddressesAndPercentages before any proposal is made

initial_code_evidence.vulnerable_pattern: No validation that proposal exists before approval
initial_code_evidence.specific_concern: All artist addresses default to address(0); .call to address(0) succeeds, burning ETH

analysis_questions: Does .call{value: x}("") to address(0) actually succeed?
What percentage of royalties would be burned (depends on artistPercentage)?
validation_requirements: Call payArtist and verify ETH sent to address(0)

original_hypothesis.preliminary_attack_scenario: Admin accidentally or maliciously approves payment addresses before artist proposes them. When payArtist is called, ETH is sent to address(0) for the artist's share. The collectionTotalAmount is zeroed. Artist funds are permanently burned.
prerequisites: Admin error or malicious admin action

potential_impact_if_confirmed.financial_impact: Loss of artist's share of collection mint proceeds
potential_impact_if_confirmed.recovery_possibility: None - ETH burned via transfer to address(0)

original_hypothesis.test_coverage_gap: No test for approving without prior proposal

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
